methods.name: Air Handwriting Authentication
methods.description: Authenticates users based on the unique behavioural characteristics of a user's handwriting in the air. The text to be written is chosen by the verifier, making this a challenge-response style authentication method. A 3D motion sensor is used to capture the 3D motions.
sources: @article{xuChallengeResponseAuthenticationUsing2020, title = {Challenge-{{Response Authentication Using In-Air Handwriting Style Verification}}}, author = {Xu, Wenyuan and Tian, Jing and Cao, Yu and Wang, Song}, year = {2020}, month = jan, journal = {IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing}, volume = {17}, number = {1}, pages = {51--64}, issn = {1941-0018}, doi = {10.1109/TDSC.2017.2752164}}
